accounting_information.check_consolidation: All bills on single check (hide extra stub detail)
accounting_information.check_stub_breakdown: List each bill detail line item (expanded view)

notes.body: @Candice.Palacio request for W-9 and COI for Workers' Comp Insurance. If exempt, need written statement from Board of WC. Current COI does not show Southeastern Apartment Investment Corp as 'additional insured' — needs correction.
Did not send 1099 since paid with Zelle.

texts_sample.body: New job from Woodland Parc #19206-1, Location: Bell Drive, Smyrna, GA 30080, View details link, Reply STOP to unsubscribe.

dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-VEND-01: Vendor schema needs: Federal Tax block (W-9 request flag + masked tax ID + 1099 boolean), Accounting block (payment terms, default GL, check consolidation), Compliance block (6 distinct expiration dates), Portal activation boolean, and free-form Notes thread.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-COMP-01: Vendor compliance has 6 separate expiration dates (Workers' Comp, General Liability, EPA, Auto Insurance, State License, Contract). Dwellium's Vendor Compliance widget should surface rollup 'next expiring cert' + per-vendor detail.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-BILL-01: Zelle-paid vendors bypass 1099 — Dwellium's AP module must support this. Lisa's 1/17/2024 note is the real-world case for this exception.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-COMM-02: System-generated SMS to vendor (with appfol.io shortlink + STOP-to-unsubscribe) is the canonical Dwellium dispatch-notification template.
